title: Agentic & Physical AI
subtitle: Building autonomous embodied systems that understand intent and act in the physical world
intro: Agentic & Physical AI explores how embodied systems can perceive, reason, and act autonomously in complex environments while aligning with human intent, needs, and safety constraints.

vision.text: Enable machines to understand human intent and operate safely as autonomous agents in real-world environments.

mission.text: Integrate embodiment, reasoning, and adaptive decision-making into next-generation physical AI systems.

activities.title: Embodied Agentic AI
activities.text: Developing autonomous agents capable of perception-action loops in real-time physical environments.

activities.title: Neuro-Symbolic World Models
activities.text: Combining learning-based and symbolic reasoning approaches to build structured, generalizable world understanding.

activities.title: Human Intent & Needs Understanding
activities.text: Modeling human goals, preferences, and contextual intent for aligned decision-making in embodied agents.

publications.title: Post-ChatGPT Era: Embodied Agentic Systems for Real-World AI

cta.title: Work on Embodied AI
cta.text: Join research on agentic systems, world models, and physical intelligence for next-generation robotics.
